top_signals.title: US Economy Is a 'Levered Bet on AI,' Orszag Says
top_signals.summary: Peter Orszag, CEO of Lazard, joins Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Deals." He says the US economy is now a heavy bet on the success of artificial intelligence. He also talks about how Lazard advised on NextEra Energy buying Dominion Energy for $67 billion. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: FTC warns 12 major tech firms of violating Take It Down Act
top_signals.summary: The law mandates that platforms make it easy for people to ask that nonconsensual intimate images be removed and to delete them within 48 hours of a request.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: £3m Fenomeno Roadster is most powerful open Lamborghini ever
top_signals.summary: Lamborghini has announced the most powerful convertible in its 63-year history: the 1,080hp Fenomeno Roadster. Following the launch of the Fenomeno coupe at Monterey Car Week last year, the Roadster is the latest ultra-limited hypercar in Lamborghini’s ‘Few Off’ production series.  The Fenomeno Roadster was the star attraction at the Lamborghini Arena event for owners [...]
